summary: A State of the Union excerpt of Trump claiming zero illegal aliens have entered in nine months, with a single inserted text/stat card ('ZERO ILLEGAL ALIENS HAVE ENTERED THE U.S. IN THE LAST 9 MONTHS') and a 'TEXT SOTU' banner. Predominantly a raw speech with one graphic insert, not a music-driven production.
notable_text: Stat card: 'ZERO ILLEGAL ALIENS HAVE ENTERED THE U.S. IN THE LAST 9 MONTHS'; 'LAW & ORDER / 2026 STATE OF THE UNION'; banner 'TEXT SOTU TO 45470 FOR UPDATES'.
